data.name: Marble Maid 2: The Negative Levels
data.detailed_description:
Deep in the damp dungeons of a forgotten mansion, evil lurks. The Nega Maid has awoken and is hungry for chaos.

Set before Marble Maid you play as Nega Maid, who is tasked with the job of messing up the mansion above. Using her powers you must gather all the dust bunnies from the dungeons below and set them loose!


Set explosives on fire to launch yourself to higher levels, ride cables as an electric spark and get down and dirty with Nega Maid, unlocking sexy and NSFW artwork along the way.

Marble Maid 2: The Negative Levels is a followup and a prequel to the first game. With all new mechanics, lost and scrapped ideas from the first game and new and exciting levels to challenge yourself through.


-Over 60 levels of Marble Maddness gameplay!
-Over 20 new sexy images to unlock and enjoy!
-New Soundtrack (capturing the dark and gritty world of Marble Maid 2)
-Flame Maid & Electric Maid (Powers to help you solve new puzzles!)
-New Dust Bunny types! (Buns that swim, resistant to certain elements and even made of pure electricity!)
-Unique Boss Battles (The Bun Babe will have you on your toes with explosive and unique fights!)
-New Challenges (Ultra Hard Mode & Hidden Coins for you to find!)
-Golf Mode (A new way to play! Wind up your shot and sink Nega Maid to get those bunnies!)
-Unlockable Costumes & Skins (Decorate your Marble, customize your smoke trail and dress up your maid!)
-Secret Levels & Worlds!


All characters in Marble Maid 2: The Negative Levels are 18+ and above

data.short_description: Deep in the damp dungeons of a forgotten mansion, evil lurks. A sexy maid is ready to cause chaos!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7 7700HQ CPU @ 2.8GHz
  • 顯示卡: NVidia GeForce GTX 1060
  • 音效卡: Yes
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7 7700HQ CPU @ 2.8GHz
  • 顯示卡: NVidia GeForce GTX 1060
  • 音效卡: Yes
